# Rules for src/lib/paths.ts

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src/lib/paths.ts. Do not edit manually. -->

## Config Implementation (config-impl)

- [CI-02] formatScopePath() normalizes backslashes to forward slashes and abbreviates project-scope paths via abbreviatePath(). User-scope paths (~/...) pass through unchanged.

## Activity Panel (activity-panel)

- [AP-01] canonicalizePath() in paths.ts converts any path to a stable forward-slash form for identity comparisons: backslashes -> forward slashes, MSYS-style /c/Users/ -> C:/Users/, drive letter normalized to uppercase, trailing slashes stripped. Used at ingress in useTapEventProcessor (ToolInput file_path, InstructionsLoadedEvent, PermissionRejected) and useFileWatcher (fs-change events) to ensure cross-platform path identity.

## Config Schema and Providers (config-schema)

- [CM-02] formatScopePath() normalizes backslashes to forward slashes and abbreviates project-scope paths via abbreviatePath(). User-scope paths (~/...) pass through unchanged.

## Data Flow (data-flow)

- [DF-09] groupSessionsByDir() and swapWithinGroup() in paths.ts: pure functions for tab grouping by normalized workingDir (Map-based, O(n) single pass, insertion-order groups) and position swapping within group boundaries. TabGroup type exported. parseWorktreePath() detects `.claude/worktrees/<slug>` paths, worktreeAcronym() abbreviates slugs by hyphen initials.
